file.string: 无线调试配对需要 WiFi 网络连接。\n请连接 WiFi 后重试。
无线配对仅支持 Android 11 及以上系统。\n您的设备为 Android %1$d。
第 1 步：开启开发者选项
打开「设置」→「关于手机」→ 连续点击「版本号」%1$d 次\n\n系统会提示「您现在处于开发者模式」
您可能会看到系统安全警告，这是正常现象，请放心点击确认。
第 2 步：开启无线调试
打开「开发者选项」→ 开启「无线调试」开关\n然后点击「使用配对码配对设备」
正在搜索无线调试服务…
已发现！请点击「使用配对码配对设备」
在开发者选项中，向下滑动找到「无线调试」并点击进入
请点击「使用配对码配对设备」
在无线调试页面中，点击「使用配对码配对设备」，将弹窗中的 %1$d 位配对码输入到 OpenCyvis

1. 点击下方「打开无线调试」
2. 点击「无线调试」进入其设置页
3. 点击「使用配对码配对设备」
4. 将弹窗中显示的 %1$d 位配对码输入到下方
点击「无线调试」→「使用配对码配对设备」，然后输入 %1$d 位配对码
配对码不正确，请重新输入
配对码已失效，请在系统设置中重新获取
配对成功但连接失败，正在重试…
未能自动发现无线调试服务。\n请确认 WiFi 已连接且无线调试已开启。
WiFi 已断开，请重新连接
设备已连接，可以开始使用。
配对成功！点击返回 OpenCyvis
小米设备可能需要插入 SIM 卡并登录小米账号才能开启 USB 调试安全设置。
请将通知样式切换为「Android」样式以使用通知栏输入功能。
提示：ColorOS 设备的开发者选项可能在重启后自动关闭，届时需重新配对。
请关闭电池优化以确保后台服务正常运行。
ADB 无线调试配对引导通知
在另一侧的「无线调试」设置中，点击「使用配对码配对设备」获取配对码
请手动进入：设置 → 系统 → 开发者选项 → 无线调试
Debug mode: show LLM response details
Please complete sensitive input on the device. The agent will not read or store your input.
Returning control to agent in %1$d seconds.
Waiting for you to complete sensitive input…
Please complete sensitive input on the device
Page has changed, agent taking over
Select apps the AI cannot access
Generate QR code to share LLM settings
Import LLM settings from QR code
Invalid QR code — not an OpenCyvis config link
No profile — tap to save or switch
Control the agent via messaging apps
Send a screenshot after each step
Generate a code to pair your account
Show debug shortcuts on home screen
Manual IDs for debug and recovery
Send /pair %1$s in your %2$s chat.\n\nThis code expires in 10 minutes.
High-priority alerts when the agent is waiting for your answer
Pairing code expired. Please generate a new one.
Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
Send /pair <code> to pair with this device.
Agent is busy, send /stop to terminate first
Commands not supported in group chats
Enter App ID and App Secret manually
Open Feishu and scan this QR code
QR code expired. Please try again.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Bot ready — send a message to auto-pair
What would you like to do?
Order a coffee, open Luckin or Starbucks
Check today\'s weather and travel advice
OpenCyvis can show a floating indicator while tasks run in the background. This is optional.
Location permission denied. Geofence cannot be set.
Run this often? Save as routine
Wireless debugging pairing requires a WiFi connection.\nPlease connect to WiFi and try again.
Wireless pairing requires Android 11 or higher.\nYour device is running Android %1$d.
Open Settings → About Phone → Tap \"Build Number\" %1$d times\n\nYou\'ll see \"You are now a developer!\"
You may see a security warning — this is normal, tap OK to continue.
Open Developer Options → Enable \"Wireless Debugging\"\nThen tap \"Pair device with pairing code\"
Found! Tap \"Pair device with pairing code\"
In Developer Options, scroll down and tap \"Wireless debugging\" to enter
In Wireless Debugging settings, tap \"Pair device with pairing code\", then enter the %1$d-digit code in OpenCyvis

1. Tap "Open Wireless Debugging" below
2. Tap "Wireless debugging" to enter its settings
3. Tap "Pair device with pairing code"
4. Enter the %1$d-digit code shown in the dialog below
Tap \"Wireless debugging\" → \"Pair device with pairing code\", then enter the %1$d-digit code
Code expired. Please get a new one from Settings.
Could not find wireless debugging service.\nMake sure WiFi is on and Wireless Debugging is enabled.
Paired! Tap to return to OpenCyvis
Xiaomi devices may require a SIM card and Mi Account login to enable USB debugging security.
Please switch notification style to \"Android\" to use notification input.
Note: ColorOS may auto-disable Developer Options after restart. Re-pairing may be needed.
Please disable battery optimization to keep the background service running.
Tap \"Pair device with pairing code\" in the Wireless Debugging settings on the other side
Please open Settings → System → Developer options → Wireless debugging manually
请在设备上完成敏感输入。Agent 不会读取或保存你输入的内容。
将在 %1$d 秒后交还给 agent。
已达最大步数 (%1$d)，任务未完成
需要你在设备上完成敏感输入：%1$s
请在设备上完成敏感输入
页面已变化，Agent 接管中
选择 AI 不可访问的应用
通过即时通讯应用控制 Agent
显示 LLM 响应详情
在主页显示调试用快捷指令
查看和编辑 Agent 记忆
手动设置 ID（调试/恢复）
在你的 %2$s 中发送 /pair %1$s。\n\n此配对码 10 分钟后过期。
未保存配置 — 点击保存或切换
Agent 等待用户回答时的高优先级提醒
配对成功！你现在可以发送指令了。
配对码已过期，请重新生成。
尝试次数过多，请稍后再试。
发送 /pair <配对码> 完成配对。配对码在 OpenCyvis 设置中查看。
已解绑。发送 /pair <配对码> 重新配对。
Agent 忙，/stop 终止后再发
帮我点一杯咖啡，打开瑞幸或星巴克
查询今天的天气和出行建议
发送给 Agent 的指令
OpenCyvis 可以在任务后台运行时显示浮动指示器，这是可选的。
地点名称（如 公司、家）
位置权限被拒绝，无法设置地理围栏
经常执行？保存为例行任务
